tests: Whether returns move together over a window
not_enough_because: Two prices can be highly correlated and still drift apart forever
trade_requirement: Use for screening, not final stationarity proof

tests: Whether a linear combination or spread is stationary
not_enough_because: The relationship can break after the test window
trade_requirement: ADF-test the residual spread and monitor for breakdown

tests: How many units of one leg offset the other
not_enough_because: Look-ahead hedge ratios overstate live performance
trade_requirement: Estimate on training window only; lecture uses first 90 days
Use when pair logic becomes a portfolio
